fingerprints: Page titles, JavaScript assets, or cookies mention NC, UAP, 用友, or nccloud
Legacy servlet routing coexists with modern NC pages
signals: POSTed bsh.script content changes the response body
BeanShell endpoint returns command output or interpreter errors
The servlet is exposed without strong administrative protection

preconditions: The target is a Yonyou NC deployment exposing the BeanShell servlet.
The servlet is not fully gated behind VPN, SSO, or strong admin auth.
Returned command output is observable through the HTTP response.

matchers: Response differs from baseline access-denied or 404 behavior

stabilization: 优先识别当前主机是否同时承载 NC 中间件、数据库客户端、文件共享或内网代理能力。
重点收集 nc.home、uap 配置、数据库连接串、LDAP / AD 对接配置与调度任务凭据。
如果是比赛第三赛区风格环境，BeanShell 成功后要尽快把主机角色和可横向资源梳理清楚。

shell_options.template: Use BeanShell to invoke powershell -nop -w hidden -enc {base64_payload}
Use BeanShell to run whoami && hostname && ipconfig /all

preferred_order: 先 print，再 whoami / hostname，最后再考虑更重的动作。
优先识别操作系统和运行身份，再决定是走 PowerShell、cmd 还是 Java 内存侧枚举。
拿到权限后优先找长期可复用凭据与横向入口，而不是在同一接口上反复跑命令。
shell_prerequisites: Reverse-shell style payloads require outbound connectivity or an internal relay.
Direct OS-command execution depends on the servlet not being sandboxed by the application container.
fallbacks: If exec is unstable, use BeanShell to read local config files and JVM properties instead of direct shelling.
If the servlet is filtered, pivot to other NC legacy services, deserialization surfaces, or weakly protected admin modules.

detection_notes: Yonyou NC targets in competitions frequently pair an OA foothold with internal credential reuse or service pivoting, so environment mapping matters as much as the initial RCE.
Windows deployment is common, but mixed Java/Linux stacks also exist; always verify before choosing command style.
references: Common NC legacy servlet exploitation notes
